name: MANNKIND CORP
business: We are a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to transforming chronic disease care through innovative, patient-centric solutions. Focused on cardiometabolic and orphan lung diseases, we develop and commercialize treatments that address serious unmet medical needs, including diabetes, pulmonary hypertension, and fluid overload in heart failure and chronic kidney disease. Our cardiometabolic business includes Afrezza (inhaled insulin), Furoscix (furosemide injection), and V-Go (wearable insulin delivery); our orphan lung disease portfolio includes Tyvaso DPI (treprostinil) and pipeline candidates MNKD-201 and MNKD-701.
sellsTo: Patients with diabetes, heart failure, chronic kidney disease, pulmonary hypertension

exposures.sentence: Afrezza is an ultra rapid-acting inhaled insulin indicated to improve glycemic control in adults with diabetes.
Furoscix is a novel formulation of furosemide that delivers an 80 mg dose via an on-body infusor over a five-hour period.
V-Go is a mechanical basal-bolus insulin delivery system that is worn like a patch and can eliminate the need for taking multiple daily injections.

Tyvaso DPI (treprostinil) inhalation powder, received FDA approval in May 2022 for the treatment of pulmonary arterial hypertension ("PAH") and pulmonary hypertension associated with interstitial lung disease ("PH-ILD").

Our Technosphere drug delivery platform enjoys patent protection relating to the powder, its manufacture, its use for pulmonary delivery of drugs as well as protection related to our inhalers and associated cartridges.

The other major program in our pipeline that will potentially address an orphan lung disease is MNKD-201, a dry-powder formulation of nintedanib for the treatment of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis ("IPF").
MNKD-701 is another pipeline opportunity that we are exploring.

Additional patents and patent applications are expected to provide protection for products in our pipeline, including MNKD-201, MNKD-701, our BluHale inhalation-profiling apparatus and various development tools.

catalysts.event: FDA PDUFA decision on Afrezza sBLA for pediatric approval
catalysts.sentence: The sBLA has been assigned a Prescription Drug User Fee Act ("PDUFA") target action date of May 29, 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA PDUFA decision on Furoscix ReadyFlow Autoinjector sNDA
catalysts.sentence: The sNDA has been assigned a Prescription Drug User Fee Act ("PDUFA") target action date of July 26, 2026.

catalysts.event: Top line data from Phase 1b study of MNKD-201
catalysts.sentence: We are currently conducting a Phase 1b 6 study of MNKD-201 in the United States, top line data expected in early 2H 2026

catalysts.event: First patient enrollment in Phase 2 study of MNKD-201
catalysts.sentence: global Phase 2 study to assess the potential safety and efficacy of this investigational product in patients with IPF, in which we expect the first patient to be enrolled in in Q2 2026.
